prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to england and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: This document pertains to housing regulations and standards enforced by the Secretary of State, which apply specifically to England. The mention of the Housing Ombudsman indicates a focus on services and standards relevant to housing associations operating within England.
